title: Savory Smoky Middle Eastern Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic Middle Eastern dish featuring lamb kebabs served on sesame seed burger buns, perfect for a special occasion. The combination of smoky lamb, crunchy vegetables, and creamy tzatziki sauce creates a delightful taste experience.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes, red onion, and red bell pepper onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Warm the sesame seed burger buns on the grill.
Assemble the kebabs by placing them on the toasted burger buns and topping with tzatziki sauce.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
